description_long: This is a two-story brick bakery building with a dark, gabled roof and two chimneys. The front facade features large display windows and a blue awning above the main entrance, with a sign reading 'Cake House Bakery.' The ground floor has a stone-paved sidewalk and a small storefront area, while the upper floor has three large windows with decorative brickwork. The side and rear walls are plain, with red brick on the upper half and gray stone or concrete on the lower half. The building sits on a corner lot with adjacent paved streets and visible crosswalk markings. A wooden bench is placed along one side of the building, enhancing its urban streetscape setting.
description: A two-story brick bakery with a blue awning, large display windows, and a prominent 'Cake House Bakery' sign, set on a stone-paved corner with urban street features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, blue awning, large display windows, and the 'Cake House Bakery' sign.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain brick and stone wall, with a wooden bench and no windows or signage.
description_view_2: Rear view with two large windows and a stone-paved area, lacking signage or awnings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick and stone wall, a wooden bench, and adjacent street markings.
attribute_storefront_signage: A rectangular sign above the main entrance reads 'Cake House Bakery' in gold script on a blue background. The sign is mounted on the facade above the awning and is bordered by a thin gold frame.
attribute_display_window_with_baked_good: There are two large display windows on the front facade, each featuring shelves with visible baked goods such as cakes and pastries arranged inside.
attribute_awning_with_bakery_branding: A blue fabric awning with scalloped edges is present above the main entrance and display windows. The awning does not appear to have any visible bakery branding, logos, or text.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a traditional English or Victorian commercial style, characterized by red brickwork, large display windows, decorative window arches, and a gabled roof with chimneys.
